tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsAssetsRunDiscovery
tools.description: Runs asset discovery. The discovery is tracked with a long-running operation. This API can only be called with limited frequency for an organization. If it is called too frequently the caller will receive a TOO_MANY_REQUESTS error.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsSourcesCreate
tools.description: Creates a source.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsSourcesFindingsCreate
tools.description: Creates a finding. The corresponding source must exist for finding creation to succeed.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsSourcesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy on the specified Source.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsSourcesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified Source.

tools.name: organizations.securitycenterOrganizationsSourcesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns the permissions that a caller has on the specified source.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsAssetsGroup
tools.description: Filters an organization's assets and groups them by their specified properties.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsAssetsList
tools.description: Lists an organization's assets.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsBigQueryExportsCreate
tools.description: Creates a BigQuery export.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsBigQueryExportsList
tools.description: Lists BigQuery exports. Note that when requesting BigQuery exports at a given level all exports under that level are also returned e.g. if requesting BigQuery exports under a folder, then all BigQuery exports immediately under the folder plus the ones created under the projects within the folder are returned.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsFindingsBulkMute
tools.description: Kicks off an LRO to bulk mute findings for a parent based on a filter. The parent can be either an organization, folder or project. The findings matched by the filter will be muted after the LRO is done.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsMuteConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a mute config.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsMuteConfigsList
tools.description: Lists mute configs.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsNotificationConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a notification config.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsNotificationConfigsList
tools.description: Lists notification configs.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsCustomModulesCreate
tools.description: Creates a resident SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule at the scope of the given CRM parent, and also creates inherited SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for all CRM descendants of the given parent. These modules are enabled by default.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsCustomModulesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule and all of its descendants in the CRM hierarchy. This method is only supported for resident custom modules.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsCustomModulesList
tools.description: Returns a list of all SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for the given parent. This includes resident modules defined at the scope of the parent, and inherited modules, inherited from CRM ancestors.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsCustomModulesListDescendant
tools.description: Returns a list of all resident SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules under the given CRM parent and all of the parent’s CRM descendants.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsEffectiveCustomModulesGet
tools.description: Retrieves an EffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSecurityHealthAnalyticsSettingsEffectiveCustomModulesList
tools.description: Returns a list of all EffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for the given parent. This includes resident modules defined at the scope of the parent, and inherited modules, inherited from CRM ancestors.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesFindingsExternalSystemsPatch
tools.description: Updates external system. This is for a given finding.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesFindingsGroup
tools.description: Filters an organization or source's findings and groups them by their specified properties. To group across all sources provide a `-` as the source id. Example: /v1/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings, /v1/folders/{folder_id}/sources/-/findings, /v1/projects/{project_id}/sources/-/findings

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesFindingsList
tools.description: Lists an organization or source's findings. To list across all sources provide a `-` as the source id. Example: /v1/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesFindingsSetMute
tools.description: Updates the mute state of a finding.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesFindingsSetState
tools.description: Updates the state of a finding.

tools.name: projects.securitycenterProjectsSourcesList
tools.description: Lists all sources belonging to an organization.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
